case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KATHLEEN CHAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, KATHLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 30 DAKOTA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KATHLEEN DOES 1 TO 10

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DAILY RENTAL VALUE 5.43 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KATHLEEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS **PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION INCLUDED** AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KATHLEEN
